events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: plenum vs. riser cable in wrong space. This means a riser-rated cable (CMR) was installed in a plenum space, or plenum cable in a riser space. The key issue is that plenum spaces require plenum-rated cable (CMP) per NEC 800. Using riser cable (CMR) in a plenum space is a code violation and fire hazard. This is a fail.

  "actions": [
    "Remove and replace the riser cable with plenum-rated (CMP) cable in the plenum space, or reroute cable outside the plenum space.",
    "Verify all cable runs for correct plenum/riser/general-purpose rating per space before close-out."
  ],
  "rationale": "Plenum spaces (air-handling ceilings, ducts, or return-air plenums) require plenum-rated (CMP) cabling with low smoke/flame spread characteristics. Riser-rated (CMR) cable is not permitted in plenum spaces because it can contribute smoke and flame spread through the building's air distribution path. This is a fire/life-safety non-compliance and must be corrected before close-out.",
  "references": ["NEC 800", "TIA-568"]
}
